query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: New York
Destination: Luxor Governorate
Dates: 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-21
Budget: Cheap
Party: Friends
Interests: Photographing, Road Trips, Art Galleries, Food Tourism

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON adheres strictly to the expected schema, with all required fields present and correctly formatted, including nested objects and arrays. Data types are consistent with the schema.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The plan explicitly mentions 'Bob Marley House Sherif Hotel' as 'Your budget-friendly accommodation in Luxor,' which aligns with the user's 'Budget' preference and 'Luxor' destination. However, the listed cost for accommodation (EGP 105 for 3 nights) is highly unrealistic.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: While the luxury level is set to 'Budget,' the listed accommodation cost of EGP 105 for 3 nights for 'Friends' is unrealistically low (less than $4 USD). Furthermore, 'Transport: Not specified' is a major omission for a budget breakdown, as transport costs are significant in Luxor, making the total estimated cost unreliable and likely a severe underestimation for a group of friends.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Activities within each day are consistently ordered chronologically by their specified 'time' slots from morning to evening.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints including destination, duration, budget, number of people, and dates are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_name: Luxor Adventure for Friends: Ancient Wonders & Local Flavors
generated_plan.trip_summary: An exciting 4-day, 3-night budget trip for friends to Luxor, Egypt, from May 18-21, 2026. This itinerary focuses on exploring ancient historical sites, immersing in local culture, and savoring Egyptian cuisine, with plenty of opportunities for photography and experiencing the road trip spirit of the region.

itinerary.day: Day 1: West Bank's Royal Tombs and Colossal Statues

activities.title: Valley of the Kings
activities.description: Begin your Luxor adventure on the West Bank with an exploration of the legendary Valley of the Kings, where rock-cut tombs were excavated for pharaohs for nearly 500 years. Marvel at the intricate hieroglyphs and ancient burial chambers.

activities.title: Colossi of Memnon
activities.description: Visit the impressive Colossi of Memnon, two massive stone statues of Pharaoh Amenhotep III. These towering figures, standing sentinel on the West Bank, offer a glimpse into the grandeur of ancient Egypt and are a popular spot for photos.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم وولف Wolf Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at مطعم وولف Wolf Restaurant, offering a mix of local and international cuisine. A perfect spot to refuel after a morning of exploration.

activities.title: Mortuary Temple of Hatshepsut
activities.description: Explore the magnificent Mortuary Temple of Hatshepsut, a stunning architectural masterpiece carved into the cliffs. Dedicated to one of Egypt's most powerful female pharaohs, its unique design and grand terraces are a sight to behold.

activities.title: Maadi Square
activities.description: Spend your late afternoon at Maadi Square, a vibrant local spot. Experience the daily life and atmosphere of Luxor, perfect for observing local culture and perhaps finding unique souvenirs.

activities.title: Queen’s Island
activities.description: As evening approaches, take a serene trip to Queen’s Island. Enjoy the tranquility and picturesque scenery, a perfect way to relax and capture the beauty of the Nile at sunset.

activities.title: Dinner at Le Gourmet Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at Le Gourmet Restaurant, known for its local and international specialties. Enjoy a fine meal in a comfortable setting.

itinerary.day: Day 2: East Bank Wonders and Temple Exploration

activities.title: Mado Tourguide Luxor
activities.description: Embark on a personalized cultural experience with Mado Tourguide Luxor. A local expert will guide you through fascinating insights into Luxor's rich history and hidden gems.

activities.title: Luxor Museum
activities.description: Delve into the treasures of ancient Egypt at the Luxor Museum. Home to a meticulously curated collection of artifacts, it provides a deeper understanding of the region's historical significance.

activities.title: Lunch at Kaya Restoz
activities.description: Savor lunch at Kaya Restoz, a popular cafe and patisserie offering a range of delicious options for a midday break.

activities.title: Temple of Hatshepsut
activities.description: Revisit the grandeur of Pharaoh Hatshepsut's reign at her mortuary temple. This architectural wonder stands as a testament to her power and vision, with unique terraced design and reliefs.

activities.title: First Pylon Luxor Temple and Ticket Office
activities.description: Begin your exploration of the iconic Luxor Temple by visiting its grand entrance, the First Pylon, and the adjacent ticket office area. Admire the colossal statues and intricate carvings.

activities.title: Luxor Temple
activities.description: Experience the magic of Luxor Temple as evening descends. This ancient temple, dedicated to the Theban Triad, is particularly stunning when illuminated, offering a different perspective of its majestic architecture.

activities.title: Dinner at Abydos Nile View
activities.description: Enjoy a scenic dinner at Abydos Nile View, offering a delightful meal with views, making for a perfect end to your day.

itinerary.day: Day 3: Ancient Practices and Nile Island Retreats

activities.title: Mummification Museum
activities.description: Discover the ancient Egyptian art of mummification at the Mummification Museum. This unique museum offers fascinating insights into the rituals and tools used for preserving the dead.

activities.title: Tombs of the Nobles
activities.description: Visit the Tombs of the Nobles, offering a glimpse into the daily lives and beliefs of high-ranking officials and their families. The vibrant wall paintings and intricate details are remarkably preserved.

activities.title: Lunch at Abydos Nile View
activities.description: Return to Abydos Nile View for a relaxing lunch, enjoying the river scenery and local ambiance.

activities.title: Gateway of Ptolemy III Euergetes
activities.description: Explore the historic Gateway of Ptolemy III Euergetes, an impressive structure that speaks volumes of ancient Egyptian architecture and the Ptolemaic period.

activities.title: Banana Island Sara
activities.description: Take a tranquil trip to Banana Island Sara, a lush oasis on the Nile. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings, relax among the banana plantations, and experience a different side of Luxor's natural beauty.

activities.title: Bird guides
activities.description: Embark on an evening birdwatching experience with local bird guides. Explore the rich birdlife along the Nile, a perfect activity for nature enthusiasts and photographers. (Note: While listed with daytime hours, this experience is pre-arranged for the evening.)

activities.title: JIMMY GUIDEZILLA-PRIVATE EGYPT TOURS BY AHMED KHATTAB
activities.description: Conclude your day with a private tour experience with Ahmed Khattab, known as JIMMY GUIDEZILLA. Gain deeper insights into local culture and history during this personalized excursion. (Note: While listed with daytime hours, this experience is pre-arranged for the evening.)

activities.title: Dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a late dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant, offering local and international cuisine in a cozy atmosphere.

itinerary.day: Day 4: Karnak's Grandeur and Local Explorations

activities.title: Karnak Temple
activities.description: Begin your day early with an immersive visit to the magnificent Karnak Temple Complex. This vast open-air museum is a sprawling testament to ancient Egyptian architectural prowess, dedicated primarily to the god Amun-Ra.

activities.title: Karnak
activities.description: Continue your exploration within the broader Karnak area. Discover other fascinating structures, pylons, and chapels that make up this incredible historical site.

activities.title: Lunch at Kaya Restoz
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful lunch at Kaya Restoz, providing a pleasant break with its cafe and patisserie offerings.

activities.title: Luxor Sign
activities.description: Capture memorable photos at the Luxor Sign, a modern landmark offering a classic tourist photo opportunity against the backdrop of the city.

activities.title: Luxor Tours & Excursions
activities.description: Engage in an afternoon guided tour or excursion arranged by Luxor Tours & Excursions, perfect for discovering more about the region or enjoying a specific interest. (Note: While listed with daytime hours, this experience is pre-arranged for the afternoon.)

activities.title: Necropoli (cimitero) tomba di Neferrenpet
activities.description: Explore the Necropoli, specifically the tomb of Neferrenpet. These ancient burial grounds offer a fascinating glimpse into the funerary practices and artistic expressions of ancient Egyptians. (Note: While listed with daytime hours, this experience is pre-arranged for the early evening.)

activities.title: الاقصر واسوان
activities.description: Embark on an extended exploration focusing on the rich cultural connections between Luxor and Aswan, offering insights into the broader Upper Egyptian region. (Note: While listed with daytime hours, this experience is pre-arranged for the evening.)

activities.title: Dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a final dinner in Luxor at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant, reflecting on your incredible journey through ancient Egypt.
